name: harness-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin: 15-min wizard scaffolds an AI agent orchestration pipeline (plan → implement → verify) with parallel sub-agents, CLAUDE.md, hooks, CI/CD, observability (Sentry), and a pre-launch gate. Supports web, mobile, backend, desktop, game, CLI, data/ML, and IoT project types.

plugins.name: harness-marketplace
plugins.description: Interactive scaffolding wizard → project-config.yaml + plan/implement/verify skills (parallel sub-agent orchestration) + agents + guides + CLAUDE.md + hooks + CI/CD + observability + launch-check gate. Hybrid generation: template structure + AI-generated specialists.
